code:
%%{CloudNative_DockerImage}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-06.01 — Hub Sync State (CloudNative_DockerImage)

[CloudNative_ServiceMesh] --> OUT_OF_SYNC : SyncRequested (CloudNative_K8sCluster)
note right of OUT_OF_SYNC
  Local hub detects divergence from federation:  
  • stale CRDT frame  
  • missing contributions or metrics  
  • network topology change  
end note

OUT_OF_SYNC --> FETCH_REMOTE : BeginSync
note right of FETCH_REMOTE
  Retrieve latest CRDT vector clocks and state diffs  
  from federation peers (CloudNative_ServiceMesh)  
end note

FETCH_REMOTE --> MERGE : FrameDownloaded
note right of MERGE
  Apply CRDT merge function  
  Resolve conflicts deterministically  
  Ensure convergence on shared state
end note

MERGE --> VALIDATE : MergeCompleted
note right of VALIDATE
  Run schema + hash integrity checks  
  Validate contribution and governance deltas  
  Verify signatures from remote hubs  
end note

VALIDATE --> SYNCED : SyncConfirmed (CloudNative_Serverless)
note right of SYNCED
  Federation state consistent  
  Metrics & proposals aligned with global ledger  
end note

SYNCED --> [CloudNative_K8sCluster]

%% ---- Exceptional paths ----
FETCH_REMOTE --> FAILED : NetworkTimeout / AuthError
MERGE --> FAILED : ConflictUnresolved
VALIDATE --> FAILED : HashMismatch / SignatureInvalid
FAILED --> RETRY : RetryScheduled
RETRY --> OUT_OF_SYNC : RetrySync

%% ---- Maintenance / background ----
SYNCED --> OUT_OF_SYNC : PeriodicSync / ParamChange
OUT_OF_SYNC --> DEGRADED : HubOffline / LatencyHigh
DEGRADED --> [CloudNative_HelmChart] : EscalatedToOps

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class OUT_OF_SYNC,FETCH_REMOTE,MERGE,VALIDATE,SYNCED,FAILED,RETRY,DEGRADED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个云原生场景下的Hub同步状态机，核心是一个Docker镜像相关的联邦同步流程。起点是ServiceMesh检测到本地Hub和联邦状态不一致，进入OUT_OF_SYNC状态。
明白，OUT_OF_SYNC的触发条件具体包含哪些？我注意到您提到了CRDT frame和网络拓扑变化。
对，主要是三类：stale CRDT frame、缺失的contributions或metrics、还有网络拓扑变化。同步请求是由K8sCluster触发的。接下来进入FETCH_REMOTE，从联邦节点拉取最新的CRDT向量时钟。
好的，FETCH_REMOTE之后是MERGE状态，我标注为FrameDownloaded触发。这里需要应用CRDT merge函数做确定性冲突解决。
MERGE完成后进入VALIDATE，这里要跑schema和hash完整性检查，还要验证远程Hub的签名。验证通过就到SYNCED状态，由Serverless组件确认。
SYNCED之后直接连到K8sCluster吗？还有异常路径需要处理吗，比如网络超时或者合并冲突？
是的，SYNCED回到K8sCluster。异常路径必须有：FETCH_REMOTE可能因NetworkTimeout或AuthError进入FAILED；MERGE可能因ConflictUnresolved失败；VALIDATE可能因HashMismatch或签名无效失败。FAILED之后要支持RETRY。
已添加异常路径和RETRY循环。我还注意到需要维护路径：SYNCED可以因PeriodicSync回到OUT_OF_SYNC，另外OUT_OF_SYNC在HubOffline时进入DEGRADED，最后escalate到HelmChart。
完美，所有核心状态和转换都齐了。记得给主流程和异常状态加上统一的core样式，用橙色填充。
